name: Letzte Worte VR
developer: Matthias Patscheider, Samantha Povolny, Bianca Zankl
short_description: Trapped in a strange shattered world lost in fog, you take a trip down memory lane. The past not only hides memories of your relationship between you and your brother, but also the suppressed event that may has led to his suicide. Face your deepest fear in this built-for-VR adventure.
detailed_description:
Letzte Worte is an exploration game made for virtual reality that deals with the overcoming of the loss of a loved one.

FACE THE SHADOWS OF YOUR PAST

After the death of your brother Leo, you find yourself trapped in a strange shattered world lost in fog. The memories of your past highlight the relationship between you and your brother as well as several events of your common childhood. You have to face your deepest fears in order to come to terms with your loss.


  • Explore the shattered memories and piece them back together.
  • Closely examine your surroundings to gain more information about the characters and their stories.
  • Listen to all tapes and learn more about their common childhood.
  • Unravel the secret of the suppressed trauma hidden within.
